mandate: MANDATE: WXS (Windows Installer XML) and Windows installer best
practices. TONE: Zero Preamble. No conversational filler. Artifacts

wxs_syntax: Ensure valid WXS syntax and correct usage of WiX elements.
upgrade_rules: Ensure upgrade rules are correctly defined to prevent version
com_registration_wxs: Ensure cOM classes and interfaces are correctly registered in the WXS
